leads.outreach_message:
Hi Imperial Logistics team,

We noticed that at 31% empty miles across 500+ vehicles on the JHB-DBN, JHB-CPT corridor, you could be losing R76,853,168/year in wasted fuel and driver time.

BackhaulAI eliminates empty return trips by matching your trucks with guaranteed return loads the moment they deliver. Our AI finds backhaul opportunities on the JHB ↔ DBN ↔ JHB ↔ CPT corridor with 85% match accuracy.

Other logistics companies our size save R46,111,900/year — about 60% of their empty-mile cost.

Would you be open to a 15-minute ROI analysis call? We'll show you exactly how much your fleet could save on your busiest routes.
